_capture_metadata.command_v3_protection_result: HTTP 404 — 'Branch protection has been disabled on this repository.'
_capture_metadata.interpretation: Branch protection is presently OFF on master. The classic protection endpoint returns 404 (the canonical signal). The deprecated 'protection' field embedded in the /branches/master payload still shows a stale shadow ({"enabled":true, "required_status_checks":["Build & Test (Debug)"]}) but the top-level 'protected' field is false and the protection settings endpoint refuses; treat as DISABLED. Rulesets API also returns empty array.
_capture_metadata.diff_vs_2026-06-01_baseline: MATERIAL: baseline had 3 required checks (Build & Test Debug, Build & Test Release, Code Quality), enforce_admins=true, dismiss_stale_reviews=true, strict=true, allow_force_pushes=false, allow_deletions=false. Current: protection entirely disabled.

raw_v3_protection_endpoint_response.message: Branch protection has been disabled on this repository.
